title: Polymarket Cross-Venue Signals Scientific Collaboration 13
thesis: Use Polymarket microstructure and cross-venue event matching to produce robust paper-only signal layers. This variant fuses information theory researcher guidance with signal processing/neuroscience researcher, network/epidemiology researcher to test entropy compression, surprise detection, and cross-feed information gain; multi-timescale filtering, burst detection, and low-latency state transitions; contagion paths, information spread, and lag propagation across correlated books.
guardrails: No live promotion without human approval.
No credentials or hard caps may be mutated.
